# Monely

> Monely is an iPhone finance app for AI-assisted receipt capture, monthly reports, asset tracking, and shared ledgers.

Key public pages:
- `https://monelyapp.com/` - Monely marketing landing page
- `https://monelyapp.com/privacy.html` - Hosted privacy policy for the app and static website
- `https://monelyapp.com/support.html` - Public support and troubleshooting page
- `https://monelyapp.com/terms.html` - Terms and product notices
- `https://monelyapp.com/receipt-scanner-app-for-iphone.html` - Long-tail page for receipt capture and OCR workflows on iPhone
- `https://monelyapp.com/shared-expense-tracker-for-couples.html` - Long-tail page for shared ledgers and couple-focused household finance
- `https://monelyapp.com/bill-reminder-app-with-receipt-capture.html` - Long-tail page for subscriptions, recurring payments, and imported records
- `https://monelyapp.com/expense-and-asset-tracker-for-iphone.html` - Long-tail page for spending and asset tracking in one iPhone app
- `https://monelyapp.com/expense-reports-and-forecast-app.html` - Long-tail page for reports, compare-months views, and forecasting
